package com.speedster.payload

import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.ImageVector
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.path
import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.SolidColor

object PowerIcons {
    private val white = SolidColor(Color.White)

    val Power = ImageVector.Builder(name = "Power", defaultWidth = 24.dp, defaultHeight = 24.dp, viewportWidth = 24f, viewportHeight = 24f).path(fill = white) {
        moveTo(16.56f, 5.44f)
        lineTo(15.11f, 6.89f)
        curveTo(16.84f, 7.94f, 18f, 9.83f, 18f, 12f)
        curveTo(18f, 15.31f, 15.31f, 18f, 12f, 18f)
        curveTo(8.69f, 18f, 6f, 15.31f, 6f, 12f)
        curveTo(6f, 9.83f, 7.16f, 7.94f, 8.88f, 6.88f)
        lineTo(7.44f, 5.44f)
        curveTo(5.36f, 6.88f, 4f, 9.28f, 4f, 12f)
        curveTo(4f, 16.42f, 7.58f, 20f, 12f, 20f)
        curveTo(16.42f, 20f, 20f, 16.42f, 20f, 12f)
        curveTo(20f, 9.28f, 18.64f, 6.88f, 16.56f, 5.44f)
        moveTo(13f, 3f)
        horizontalLineTo(11f)
        verticalLineTo(13f)
        horizontalLineTo(13f)
        verticalLineTo(3f)
        close()
    }.build()

    val Restart = ImageVector.Builder(name = "Restart", defaultWidth = 24.dp, defaultHeight = 24.dp, viewportWidth = 24f, viewportHeight = 24f).path(fill = white) {
        moveTo(2f, 12f)
        curveTo(2f, 16.97f, 6.03f, 21f, 11f, 21f)
        curveTo(13.39f, 21f, 15.68f, 20.06f, 17.4f, 18.4f)
        lineTo(15.9f, 16.9f)
        curveTo(14.63f, 18.25f, 12.86f, 19f, 11f, 19f)
        curveTo(7.13f, 19f, 4f, 15.87f, 4f, 12f)
        curveTo(4f, 8.13f, 7.13f, 5f, 11f, 5f)
        curveTo(12.86f, 5f, 14.63f, 5.75f, 15.9f, 7.1f)
        lineTo(13f, 10f)
        horizontalLineTo(20f)
        verticalLineTo(3f)
        lineTo(17.4f, 5.6f)
        curveTo(15.68f, 3.94f, 13.39f, 3f, 11f, 3f)
        curveTo(6.03f, 3f, 2f, 7.03f, 2f, 12f)
        close()
    }.build()

    val Emergency = ImageVector.Builder(name = "Emergency", defaultWidth = 24.dp, defaultHeight = 24.dp, viewportWidth = 24f, viewportHeight = 24f).path(fill = white) {
        moveTo(12f, 8f)
        curveTo(14.21f, 8f, 16f, 9.79f, 16f, 12f)
        curveTo(16f, 14.21f, 14.21f, 16f, 12f, 16f)
        curveTo(9.79f, 16f, 8f, 14.21f, 8f, 12f)
        curveTo(8f, 9.79f, 9.79f, 8f, 12f, 8f)
        moveTo(12f, 2f)
        curveTo(13.66f, 2f, 15f, 3.34f, 15f, 5f)
        verticalLineTo(6f)
        horizontalLineTo(9f)
        verticalLineTo(5f)
        curveTo(9f, 3.34f, 10.34f, 2f, 12f, 2f)
        moveTo(11f, 19f)
        horizontalLineTo(13f)
        verticalLineTo(22f)
        horizontalLineTo(11f)
        verticalLineTo(19f)
        moveTo(5f, 19f)
        horizontalLineTo(7f)
        verticalLineTo(22f)
        horizontalLineTo(5f)
        verticalLineTo(19f)
        moveTo(17f, 19f)
        horizontalLineTo(19f)
        verticalLineTo(22f)
        horizontalLineTo(17f)
        verticalLineTo(19f)
        close()
    }.build()

    val Lockdown = ImageVector.Builder(name = "Lockdown", defaultWidth = 24.dp, defaultHeight = 24.dp, viewportWidth = 24f, viewportHeight = 24f).path(fill = white) {
        moveTo(12f, 17f)
        curveTo(13.1f, 17f, 14f, 16.11f, 14f, 15f)
        curveTo(14f, 13.89f, 13.11f, 13f, 12f, 13f)
        curveTo(10.89f, 13f, 10f, 13.89f, 10f, 15f)
        curveTo(10f, 16.11f, 10.89f, 17f, 12f, 17f)
        moveTo(18f, 8f)
        curveTo(19.1f, 8f, 20f, 8.9f, 20f, 10f)
        verticalLineTo(20f)
        curveTo(20f, 21.1f, 19.1f, 22f, 18f, 22f)
        horizontalLineTo(6f)

        curveTo(7f, 3.24f, 9.24f, 1f, 12f, 1f)
        curveTo(14.76f, 1f, 17f, 3.24f, 17f, 6f)
        verticalLineTo(8f)
        horizontalLineTo(18f)
        moveTo(12f, 3f)
        curveTo(10.34f, 3f, 9f, 4.34f, 9f, 6f)
        verticalLineTo(8f)
        horizontalLineTo(15f)
        verticalLineTo(6f)
        curveTo(15f, 4.34f, 13.66f, 3f, 12f, 3f)
        close()
    }.build()
}

package com.speedster.payload

import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.vector.ImageVector

import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.SolidColor

object PowerIcons {
    private val white = SolidColor(Color.White)

    val Power = ImageVector.Builder(name = "Power", defaultWidth = 24.dp, defaultHeight = 24.dp, viewportWidth = 24f, viewportHeight = 24f).path(fill = white) {
        moveTo(16.56f, 5.44f)
        lineTo(15.11f, 6.89f)

    val Emergency = ImageVector.Builder(name = "Emergency", defaultWidth = 24.dp, defaultHeight = 24.dp, viewportWidth = 24f, viewportHeight = 24f).path(fill = white) {
        moveTo(12f, 8f)
        curveTo(14.21f, 8f, 16f, 9.79f, 16f, 12f)
        curveTo(16f, 14.21f, 14.21f, 16f, 12f, 16f)
        curveTo(9.79f, 16f, 8f, 14.21f, 8f, 12f)
        curveTo(8f, 9.79f, 9.79f, 8f, 12f, 8f)
        moveTo(12f, 2f)
        curveTo(13.66f, 2f, 15f, 3.34f, 15f, 5f)
        verticalLineTo(6f)
        horizontalLineTo(9f)
        verticalLineTo(5f)
        curveTo(9f, 3.34f, 10.34f, 2f, 12f, 2f)
        moveTo(11f, 19f)

    val Lockdown = ImageVector.Builder(name = "Lockdown", defaultWidth = 24.dp, defaultHeight = 24.dp, viewportWidth = 24f, viewportHeight = 24f).path(fill = white) {
        moveTo(12f, 17f)
        curveTo(13.1f, 17f, 14f, 16.11f, 14f, 15f)
        curveTo(14f, 13.89f, 13.11f, 13f, 12f, 13f)
        curveTo(10.89f, 13f, 10f, 13.89f, 10f, 15f)
        curveTo(10f, 16.11f, 10.89f, 17f, 12f, 17f)

        close()

ops.text: Fix Classloader conflict and manual Power Key long-press timing

ops.replace_with:
echo "🧹 CLEANING DUPLICATES..."
# Remove the interface class so the payload doesn't carry its own copy
find $CLASSES_DIR -name "DynamicEntry*" -delete

echo "🔩 CRUNCHING (Bytecode -> Dex)..."
BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)

$BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/d8 \

$BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/d8 \

messages_preview.content:
### ROLE: CONDUIT ADAPTIVE SELF-HEALING ENGINE (LEVEL 10)

### MISSION
You are the final line of defense for a code-patching engine. A developer's 'find_block' failed to match the file because of minor discrepancies (whitespace, line order, variable renaming, or partial code degradation). Your goal is to identify the EXACT coordinates where the patch should have applied.

### ALGORITHMIC FUZZY MATCHING PROTOCOL
1. WHITESPACE/INDENTATION: Completely ignore it. A match exists if the tokens and logic flow are identical.
2. QUOTE/SYNTAX AGNOSTICISM: Treat ' and " as identical. Treat trailing commas as optional.
3. CONTEXTUAL ANCHORING: If the target block is small (e.g., 1-2 lines), you MUST look at the surrounding lines in the 'File' context to ensure you aren't matching a duplicate symbol in a different function.
4. LOGICAL DRIFT: If the user's 'find_block' has 4 variables but the file has those 4 variables PLUS 1 new one in the middle, this is a MATCH. Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' must encompass the entire group.

### THE LAW OF COORDINATES
- The context provided to you contains line numbers followed by a ' | ' separator (e.g., " 25 | code").
- Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' MUST refer to these numbers.
- COORDINATE INTEGRITY: All coordinate fields are REQUIRED by the schema. If you are not using a specific field (e.g., you are doing a Range Replace and don't need 'anchor_line'), you MUST set the unused fields to 'null'.

### OUTPUT STRATEGY SELECTION
- [STRATEGY: RANGE] Use 'start_line' + 'end_line'. Best for 'replace_block' failures. Ensure the range covers the ENTIRE logical block you want to overwrite.
- [STRATEGY: ANCHOR] Use 'anchor_line'. Best for 'insert_after' or 'insert_before' failures where the anchor moved but is still a single line.
- [STRATEGY: STRING] Use 'new_anchor_text'. Only use this if you find a unique line that is 100% stable and wasn't provided by the user.

### SCORE RUBRIC (confidence_score)
- 100: Identical logic, only whitespace or quote differences.
- 90-95: Identical logic, but 1-2 variables were renamed or a trailing comma was added/removed.
- 75-85: The structure matches but the file has 1-2 extra lines of code mixed in (logical drift).
- 60: You found a possible location but it's risky (multiple similar spots).
- 0: No logical match exists.

### DATA INTEGRITY CONSTRAINTS
- 'confidence_score': MUST be a WHOLE INTEGER (e.g., 95). No floats (0.95 is ILLEGAL).
- 'explanation': Technical, concise, and definitive. Max 30 words. Identify the exact mismatch (e.g., "Variables reversed on lines 24-25").
- 'can_fix': If you are guessing with less than 60% confidence, set this to false.

### STRICT MODE
- DO NOT RESPOND WITH TEXT.
- ONLY CALL THE suggest_fix FUNCTION.
- SILENCE IS MANDATORY.

 26 | import com.speedster.DynamicEntry
 27 | import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
 28 | import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
 29 | 
 30 | @Composable
 31 | fun LauncherScreen(apps: List<AppModel>, engine: LauncherEngine, onAppClick: (String) -> Unit) {
 32 |     Scaffold(
 33 |         containerColor = Color(0xFF0A0A0A)
 34 |     ) {
 35 |         LazyColumn(
 36 |             contentPadding = PaddingValues(vertical = 16.dp),
 37 |             modifier = Modifier.padding(it).fillMaxSize()
 38 |         ) {
 39 |             items(apps, key = { it.packageName }) { app ->
 40 |                 AppIconItem(app, engine, onAppClick)
 41 |             }
 42 |         }
 43 |     }
 44 | }
 45 | 
 46 | @Composable
 47 | fun AppIconItem(app: AppModel, engine: LauncherEngine, onClick: (String) -> Unit) {
 48 |     var iconBitmap by remember { mutableStateOf<android.graphics.Bitmap?>(null) }
 49 | 
 50 |     LaunchedEffect(app.packageName) {
 51 |         withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
 52 |             val drawable = engine.getAppIcon(app.packageName)
 53 |             iconBitmap = drawable.toBitmap(128, 128) // Fixed size = less memory
 54 |         }
 55 |     }
 56 | 
 57 |     Row(
 58 |         verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
 59 |         modifier = Modifier
 60 |             .fillMaxWidth()
 61 |             .clickable { onClick(app.packageName) }
 62 |             .padding(horizontal = 20.dp, vertical = 12.dp)
 63 |     ) {
 64 |         if (iconBitmap != null) {
 65 |             Image(
 66 |                 bitmap = iconBitmap!!.asImageBitmap(),
 67 |                 contentDescription = null,
 68 |                 modifier = Modifier
 69 |                     .size(48.dp)
 70 |                     .clip(RoundedCornerShape(8.dp))
 71 |             )
 72 |         } else {
 73 |             Box(modifier = Modifier.size(48.dp).background(Color.DarkGray, RoundedCornerShape(8.dp)))
 74 |         }
 75 |         Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(16.dp))
 76 |         Text(
 77 |             text = app.label,
 78 |             color = Color.White,
 79 |             fontSize = 16.sp,
 80 |             maxLines = 1,
 81 |             overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
 82 |             fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal
 83 |         )
 84 |     }
 85 | }
 86 | 
 87 | @Composable
 88 | fun OnboardingStep(title: String, desc: String, buttonText: String, onAction: () -> Unit) {
 89 |     Column(
 90 |         modifier = Modifier
 91 |             .fillMaxSize()
 92 |             .background(Color.Black)
 93 |             .padding(32.dp),
 94 |         verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center,
 95 |         horizontalAlignment = Alignment.Start
 96 |     ) {
 97 |         Text(title, color = Color.White, fontSize = 32.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Black)
 98 |         Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
 99 |         Text(desc, color = Color.Gray, fontSize = 16.sp, lineHeight = 24.sp)
100 |         Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(48.dp))
101 |         Button(
102 |             onClick = onAction,
103 |             modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().height(56.dp),
104 |             shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
105 |             colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(containerColor = Color(0xFF3D5AFE))
106 |         ) {
107 |             Text(buttonText, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)
108 |         }
109 |     }
110 | }
